notes: Two-leg EURUSD/AUDUSD market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar because DEV Sharpe was -0.06, but it is the strongest remaining unbuilt OOS candidate after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739 baskets.
Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. The EA selects EURUSD/AUDUSD only because both legs have direct USD settlement in the tester.
